summary: The artificial intelligence trade kept firing up US equities to fresh records after upbeat earnings from Cisco Systems Inc. and a landmark AI IPO.

title: Kushner’s Thrive Capital Invests $100 Million in Shopify
title_cn: 库什纳的 Thrive Capital 向 Shopify 投资 1 亿美元
summary: Joshua Kushner’s Thrive Capital has taken a stake in Shopify Inc., according to people familiar with the matter, marking a rare bet by the venture firm on a public company.

title: Hantavirus Still Has World Worried, No More Cases in US
title_cn: 汉坦病毒仍然让世界担忧，美国没有更多病例
summary: There are no known cases of anyone with the hantavirus in the US now according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention. 41 people exposed while on the Hondius cruise ship are being monitored. Dr. Amesh Adalja, senior scholar at the Johns Hopkins Center for Health Security, joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Epstein Built His Sprawling Web of Influence
title_cn: 爱泼斯坦如何建立他庞大的影响力网络
summary: Jeffrey Epstein’s emails, appointment books and message logs reveal how the disgraced financier built a sprawling web of rich, powerful and influential contacts. He was a relentless networker, regularly introducing his acquaintances to each other and treating those introductions like business deals — always putting himself at the center of the transaction. Bloomberg's Lizzie Fournier joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dow Is Hardly Moving Anything Through Hormuz, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，陶氏几乎不会通过霍尔木兹进行任何运输
summary: Dow Chair and CEO Jim Fitterling says the company is "hardly moving anything" through the Strait of Hormuz due to the war in Iran. He says it could take 275 days for things to get back to normal after the waterway is reopened. He speaks to Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde on the sidelines of the Spark Summit in California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Insurance Unit Is FHLB System’s Third-Biggest Borrower
title_cn: Apollo 的保险部门是 FHLB 系统的第三大借款人
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.’s insurance arm was the third-largest borrower at the end of March in the Federal Home Loan Bank system, further increasing its holdings since the end of last year.

title: We’re Going to Talk About the Future of Trading at Odd Lots Live
title_cn: 我们将讨论 Odd Lot Live 交易的未来
summary: Come see us on May 28 in NYC.

title: Oil Steady After Trump-Xi Talks as Iran War Remains in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普与习近平会谈后油价稳定，伊朗战争仍悬而未决
summary: Oil steadied following a meeting between US President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping where discussions included the war in Iran and closer oil ties between the two nations.

title: Dollar’s Link to Oil Most Positive Ever Amid Iran Conflict
title_cn: 伊朗冲突期间美元与石油的联系最为积极
summary: Eleven weeks into a Middle Eastern conflict that has shuttered a critical shipping channel and sent energy prices soaring, the US dollar’s linkage to oil prices is more positive than ever before.

title: Schonfeld-Backed Perbak Closing Hedge Fund After ‘Too-Short’ Run
title_cn: 舍恩菲尔德支持的 Perbak 对冲基金在“过短”运行后关闭
summary: Perbak Capital Partners, a UK-based hedge fund backed by Schonfeld Strategic Advisors, is winding down after determining its assets haven’t grown enough to maintain a “significant financial buffer” to protect the business.

title: Foreign Buyers Snap Up Nearly Half of Trump’s Emergency Oil
title_cn: 外国买家抢购了特朗普近一半的紧急石油
summary: Nearly half of the crude oil released from the US Strategic Petroleum Reserve is being exported, a fresh sign of how severely global supplies have tightened amid the Iran war.

title: Trump Says China Offered Help on Iran as Ship Taken Near UAE
title_cn: 特朗普称中国向伊朗提供帮助，因为一艘船在阿联酋附近被扣押
summary: US President Donald Trump signaled China is willing to support negotiations with Iran, as he pushes for a diplomatic resolution to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, after a commercial vessel was apparently seized near the United Arab Emirates.

title: Brazilian Oil Jobs Are at 16-Year High on Offshore Drilling Boom
title_cn: 海上钻探热潮推动巴西石油就业创 16 年来新高
summary: Employment in the Brazilian oil industry has rebounded to the highest since the golden era of Petrobras’s mega-projects in 2010.

title: Peru Postpones Announcement of Election Results Until Sunday
title_cn: 秘鲁推迟至周日公布选举结果
summary: Peru will delay the official announcement of first-round election results by two days as officials continue to resolve a record number of disputed tally sheets.

title: US Farmers Dial Crop Adjusters as Wild Weather Hammers Wheat
title_cn: 美国农民拨打作物调整员，因为恶劣的天气锤击了小麦
summary: From drought to ping-pong size hail and unseasonable warmth, weather extremes have wheat farmers reaching for their phones to ring their insurance adjusters to assess the viability of their crops.

title: Trafigura Leads Race to Move US Fuel In-Country on Foreign Ships
title_cn: 托克在利用外国船舶将美国燃料运往国内的竞赛中处于领先地位
summary: Trafigura Group and Phillips 66 are the leading recipients of US government waivers allowing the use of foreign-flagged tankers to ship oil, fuel and other cargoes between domestic ports.

title: Bitcoin Tops $80,000 as Crypto Market Regulation Bill Advances
title_cn: 随着加密货币市场监管法案的推进，比特币突破 80,000 美元
summary: Bitcoin climbed past $80,000 after the Senate Banking Committee advanced a landmark US digital asset market structure bill after months of negotiations.

title: Copper Retreats From Record Close as Purchases in China Slow
title_cn: 由于中国采购放缓，铜价从创纪录收盘价回落
summary: Copper retreated from a record close as the rally started to deter purchases in China, where investors were monitoring the summit between Chinese leader Xi Jinping and US President Donald Trump.

title: Delta CEO Bastian Talks Consumer Demand, Fuel Costs and Spirit
title_cn: 达美航空首席执行官巴斯蒂安谈论消费者需求、燃油成本和精神
summary: Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian discusses consumer demand, the effects of rising jet fuel costs and Spirit's collapse, and potential industry consolidation with Caroline Hyde on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Awards Permits to Dogger Bank South, North Fall Wind Farms
title_cn: 英国向 Dogger Bank South、North Fall 风电场颁发许可证
summary: The UK government gave planning permission to three offshore wind farms, which could create as much as 4 gigawatts of new capacity as Britain steps up support for renewable energy.

title: Gold Fluctuates as Market Weighs Federal Reserve Rate Path
title_cn: 随着市场权衡美联储利率走势，黄金波动
summary: Bloomberg's James Attwood joins Vonnie Quinn on "Bloomberg Markets." Gold swung between gains and losses as investors weighed the Federal Reserve’s interest-rate path after US data this week showed a war-driven surge in inflation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Applied Materials’ Sales Forecast Gets Boost From AI Demand
title_cn: 应用材料公司的销售预测受到人工智能需求的推动
summary: Applied Materials Inc., the largest US supplier of semiconductor equipment, gave sales and profit forecasts that far exceeded analysts’ estimates, fueled by soaring demand for AI computing and memory chips.

title: Musk’s xAI Unveils First Coding Agent in Bid to Rival Anthropic
title_cn: 马斯克的 xAI 推出首款编码代理，竞逐竞争对手 Anthropic
summary: Elon Musk’s xAI is rolling out its first artificial intelligence coding agent, called Grok Build, in an attempt to catch up to Anthropic PBC’s Claude on streamlining software development.

title: Anduril Doubles Valuation to $61 Billion
title_cn: Anduril 估值翻倍至 610 亿美元
summary: Anduril doubled its valuation to $61 billion in a fresh $5 billion funding round led by Thrive Capital and Andreessen Horowitz. Anduril CEO Brian Schimpf says the company will invest “aggressively” in manufacturing capacity, research and development and infrastructure. He speaks to Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.”

title: Newsom Pitches Software Tax to Raise Billions in New Revenue
title_cn: 纽森提出软件税以筹集数十亿美元的新收入
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom is proposing a new tax on cloud-based software sales, turning to the technology sector for billions of dollars in new revenue as the state’s budget is being lifted by the artificial-intelligence boom.

title: Fermi Changes Rules to Thwart Ex-CEO’s Push to Remake Board
title_cn: 费米改变规则以阻止前首席执行官重组董事会的努力
summary: US power-plant developer Fermi Inc. changed its rules around director appointments to block efforts by its former chief executive officer to reshape the company’s board.

title: Central Themes of the Current Market with Michelle Weaver
title_cn: 米歇尔·韦弗 (Michelle Weaver) 探讨当前市场的中心主题
summary: Morgan Stanley’s US Thematic Research Head Michelle Weaver discusses the central themes in the market, with AI implementation and quantification at the center of it all. She speaks with Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Figma Sees Strong Sales Growth, Touts New AI Monetization
title_cn: Figma 销售强劲增长，大力宣传新的人工智能货币化
summary: Figma Inc. gave an outlook for revenue in the current period that topped analysts’ estimates, touting early traction from charging users directly for AI features.

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Climbs 68% After Year’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 在完成年度最大 IPO 后股价上涨 68%
summary:
Cerebras Systems Inc. shares jumped 68% in its trading debut after raising $5.5 billion in the year’s largest IPO, illustrating investors’ surging appetite for artificial intelligence data centers and the chips running them.
Shares of the Sunnyvale, California-based company pared earlier gains to close at $311.07 each on Thursday in New York, above the $185 IPO price, after being halted earlier for volatility. Cerebras’ first-time share sale raised nearly 60% more than its target when it launched, and priced above a marketed range that was revised higher on Monday. Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cash Buoys Newsom Budget as He Pitches New Software Tax
title_cn: 纽瑟姆提出新的软件税，人工智能现金提振了他的预算
summary: California Governor Gavin Newsom unveiled a revised budget that shows no deficit for this year or next, as the state draws another boost from the technology and artificial-intelligence boom.

title: AI Buildout Drives 76% Power Bill Jump on Largest US Grid
title_cn: AI 建设推动美国最大电网的电费上涨 76%
summary: Power prices on the largest electric grid in the US jumped 76% in the first quarter due to rampant demand from data centers, adding to pressure on its operator to alleviate the strain on consumers.

title: Xi Warns Trump About Taiwan
title_cn: 习近平就台湾问题警告特朗普
summary: Xi Jinping warned Donald Trump that Taiwan could lead to "clashes" between the superpowers, calling it a "highly dangerous situation" for the world's biggest economies. Michelle Giuda, CEO of the Krach Institute for Tech Diplomacy at Purdue, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss what this means for the US tech sector and what else transpired from the meeting between the two leaders. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US, China Agree Strait of Hormuz Should Be Open, Gold Fluctuates | Bloomberg Markets 5/14/2026
title_cn: 中美同意霍尔木兹海峡开放，黄金波动|彭博市场 2026 年 5 月 14 日
summary: "Bloomberg Markets" follows the market moves across every global asset class and discusses the biggest issues for Wall Street. Today's guests: CSIS Senior Fellow Chair in China Studies Henrietta Levin, Delta CEO Ed Bastian, BMO Capital Markets Senior Economist Jennifer Lee, and Atlas Merchant Founding Partner & CEO Bob Diamond. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oura Has Been Doing AI For Years, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，Oura 多年来一直致力于人工智能
summary: Oura CEO Tom Hale discusses the disruptive impact of AI-enabled health prediction - from short-term to long-term health outcomes - and how to get the scientific community on board. He also weighs in on how Apple and Oura users overlap. Live from the sidelines of the Spark Summit in California, he joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple-OpenAI Alliance Frays, Setting Up Possible Legal Fight
title_cn: Apple-OpenAI 联盟发生争执，可能引发法律诉讼
summary: Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has become strained, according to people familiar with the matter, with the AI startup failing to see the expected benefits from the deal and now preparing possible legal action.

title: Ericsson CEO: To Compete With China, You Need to Lead on Technology
title_cn: 爱立信CEO：要与中国竞争，需要技术领先
summary: Ericsson CEO Borje Ekholm discusses the company's China exposure, both from a consumer and supply chain perspective, and what he makes of the relationship between the US and China following the meeting between President Donald Trump and China's Xi Jinping in Beijing. Live from the sidelines of the Spark Summit in California, he joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Systems Surges 81% in Trading Debut
title_cn: 人工智能芯片制造商 Cerebras Systems 首日交易飙升 81%
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares jumped 81% in its trading debut on the Nasdaq, after the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center firm raised $5.55 billion in the year’s largest initial public offering. Bloomberg's Norah Mulinda is tracking the action for us.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple-OpenAI Partnership Frays, Setting Up a Possible Legal Battle
title_cn: 苹果与 OpenAI 合作关系出现摩擦，可能引发一场法律战
summary: Apple Inc.’s two-year-old partnership with OpenAI has reportedly become strained, with the AI startup preparing possible legal action after failing to see the expected benefits from the deal.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cisco Soars on Forecast Boost, AI-Focused Job Cuts
title_cn: 思科因预测增长和以人工智能为重点的裁员而飙升
summary:
Cisco Systems Inc. jumped by the most in more than 14 years after the company delivered a better-than-anticipated sales forecast and announced plans to cut thousands of jobs, an attempt to focus on the fast-growing AI market. 

Revenue will be $16.7 billion to $16.9 billion in the fiscal fourth quarter, which runs through July, the company said in a statement Wednesday. Analysts estimated sales of $15.8 billion, according to data compiled by Bloomberg.

The news signaled that Cisco, a four-decade-old stalwart of Silicon Valley, is successfully pivoting to the AI economy. Orders from data center customers are accelerating, and the company’s restructuring plan is designed to further improve its position. Bloomberg's Ryan Vlastelica takes a closer look. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Raises $5.55 Billion in Year’s Biggest IPO
title_cn: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 完成年度最大 IPO 融资 55.5 亿美元
summary: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its US initial public offering, as the AI chipmaker seizes on the surging demand for semiconductors. This is the largest IPO of the year so far. Shares were priced to open 89% above their listing price. Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman joined Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" before the stock started trading and called it a "pretty good day." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Investment Drives Market Resilience Despite Headwinds
title_cn: 尽管面临阻力，人工智能投资仍能推动市场弹性
summary: Stephanie Aliaga, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist, discusses the dominant influence of AI-related capital expenditures on the current market dynamics. Despite challenges such as rising oil prices, higher interest rates, and a sluggish economy, the AI sector is propelling earnings growth and investor focus. Aliaga highlights that 2026 is poised to be a landmark year for agentic AI, underscoring the technology's pivotal role in sustaining market momentum amid broader economic uncertainties. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-China Tech Trade & Export Controls with Fabian Villalobos
title_cn: Fabian Villalobos 的中美技术贸易和出口管制
summary: US and Chinese leaders in Beijing, scheduled for approximately 24 hours from the broadcast. Attention is drawn to the Korean equity market, which has rebounded from early losses largely due to positive movement in Samsung Electronics shares.  Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia, who joined President Trump on Air Force One en route to Beijing, signaling the importance of technology discussions at the summit. The conversation centers on semiconductor export controls and the potential for negotiations on easing these restrictions. While Nvidia can access some parts of the Chinese market, the most advanced chips remain restricted, and China's growing self-reliance and production of cheaper chip models complicate the dynamics. The last-minute inclusion of Jensen Huang suggests shifting priorities in the summit agenda, with a focus on tech trade issues and whether China will cooperate on loosening export controls. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How AI Aims to Fix Healthcare Access
title_cn: 人工智能如何解决医疗保健问题
summary: Rezilient CEO Dr. Danish Nagda says the healthcare system is at a tipping point. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about how hybrid “cloud clinics,” employer-driven care, and AI-powered doctors could eliminate long wait times, cut costs, and make switching doctors a thing of the past. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investors Should Focus on AI's Long-Term Value Migration: JPMorgan AM
title_cn: 摩根大通：投资者应关注人工智能的长期价值迁移
summary: Joanna Shen of JPMorgan Asset Management says the firm believes we are "in the early adoption AI phase." She tells Bloomberg Television that AI agents are "the first technology in decades that can supercharge the labor inputs." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mobile Carriers Join Forces to Boost Coverage in Dead Zones
title_cn: 移动运营商联手扩大死区覆盖范围
summary: AT&T Inc., T-Mobile US Inc. and Verizon Communications Inc. announced a rare joint venture Thursday that aims to make satellite capabilities more widely available to mobile phone customers.

title: $300 Billion AI Debt Binge Spreads From Wall Street to Tokyo
title_cn: 3000 亿美元的人工智能债务狂潮从华尔街蔓延到东京
summary: Bankers were still putting the final touches on Alphabet Inc.’s blockbuster $17 billion of bond sales when word started to spread Monday morning on Wall Street: the company is already hawking more debt.

title: Pentagon’s ‘Deal Team Six’ Aims to Challenge China’s Grip on Rare Earth Power
title_cn: 五角大楼的“交易第六组”旨在挑战中国对稀土力量的控制
summary: From an office a few blocks from the White House, a group of former Wall Streeters is at the forefront of the Pentagon’s plan to crack China’s critical-minerals stranglehold.

title: Trump Team Grows Frustrated With Lack of Progress in Cuba Talks
title_cn: 特朗普团队对古巴谈判缺乏进展感到沮丧
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration is growing frustrated by what it sees as a lack of progress on getting the Cuban leadership to open the island’s economy and political system despite intensifying US pressure.

title: Trump’s MAGA and Kennedy’s MAHA Team Up to Target Republican Cassidy
title_cn: 特朗普的 MAGA 和肯尼迪的 MAHA 联手瞄准共和党卡西迪
summary: Both movements find a common foe in Louisiana Senate primary

title: Argentina Inflation Slowed Down for First Time in 11 Months
title_cn: 阿根廷通胀11个月来首次放缓
summary: Argentina’s inflation slowed for the first time in 11 months in a victory for President Javier Milei after prices had jumped on the Iran war-related oil shock in March.

title: How Much Will Drivers Save If Trump Pauses the Federal Gas Tax?
title_cn: 如果特朗普暂停联邦汽油税，司机会节省多少？
summary: President Donald Trump is calling for a suspension of the federal tax on gasoline as fuel prices soar because of the war with Iran.

title: DOJ Says Yale Medical School Admissions Are Discriminatory
title_cn: 司法部称耶鲁大学医学院招生存在歧视
summary: The US Justice Department accused Yale University’s medical school of ongoing discriminatory admissions practices, according to a letter from the civil rights division shared by the agency on Thursday.

title: Xi, Trump Meet in China | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/14/2026
title_cn: 习近平与特朗普在中国会面 |权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 14 日
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Donald Trump's trip to China. On today's show, Republican Senator Ted Budd, Democratic Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Bully Pulpit International Managing Director Adam Hodge and Republican Senator Steve Daines. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Military Says It’s Hobbled in Tracking Africa Terror Groups
title_cn: 美国军方表示在追踪非洲恐怖组织方面遇到困难
summary: The Defense Department may not have sufficient resources in Africa to properly identify when Islamic State and al-Qaeda offshoots in the restive Sahel region develop the capability to mount attacks on the US homeland, the head of US Africa Command warned.

title: China Renews Import Permits for US Beef Plants as Xi, Trump Meet
title_cn: 习近平和特朗普会面时，中国更新了美国牛肉工厂的进口许可证
summary:
hina has renewed import licenses for hundreds of US beef plants, reviving trade in the meat as the leaders of the world’s two biggest economies meet in Beijing to stabilize commercial and geopolitical relations.
The permits were renewed on Thursday and are usually valid for five years, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter, who asked not to be named as they’re not authorized to speak to media.  Senator Steve Daines, Republican from Montana joins Balance of Power to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NY Plans Tax on City Homes Over $1 Million Bought With Cash
title_cn: 纽约计划对现金购买超过 100 万美元的城市房屋征税
summary: New York lawmakers are planning a new tax on New York City homes purchased in cash for at least $1 million, according to people familiar with the state budget negotiations.

title: US Authorities Move to End Fraud Cases Against Gautam Adani
title_cn: 美国当局着手结束针对高塔姆·阿达尼的欺诈案件
summary: US authorities are moving to resolve the fraud charges against Indian billionaire Gautam Adani, according to people familiar with the matter, and end a criminal case that’s hung over Asia’s richest person for more than a year.

title: Easing Chip Export Controls Will Fuel China's 'Techno-Surveillance State' Says Rep. Krishnamoorthi
title_cn: 众议员克里希纳莫提表示，放宽芯片出口管制将助长中国的“技术监控国家”
summary: Congressman Raja Krishnamoorthi, Democrat representing Illinois' 8th District joined Balance of Power to discuss the recent meeting with Trump and Xi Jinping and the importance of not easing chip exports to China. Xi Jinping signaled China is moving toward greater openness, striking an upbeat note during his meeting with US business leaders accompanying Donald Trump as the two presidents wrapped up morning talks that featured more divisive issues like trade and Taiwan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Opens Path to Challenge Starmer for Prime Minister’s Job
title_cn: 伯纳姆开辟了挑战斯塔默总理职位的道路
summary: Andy Burnham secured a path to challenge Keir Starmer for the UK prime minister’s job, after a Member of Parliament quit to give the Greater Manchester mayor a run at his seat in the House of Commons.

title: US Needs to Take Away Iran's 'Offensive Punch' Says Jensen
title_cn: 詹森表示，美国需要取消伊朗的“进攻性打击”
summary:
Ben Jensen, Director of the Futures Lab and Senior Fellow of the Defense and Security Department at the Center for Strategic and International Studies joins Balance of Power to discuss the conflict in Iran and what returning to kinetic fighting will look like. The US has destroyed more than 90% of Iran’s inventory of around 8,000 naval mines, the commander of US forces in the Middle East told lawmakers on Thursday, in a written statement that did not address Tehran’s continued control of the vital Strait of Hormuz.  
US Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper said more than 700 airstrikes had eliminated Iran’s “once-massive inventory” of sea mines but he did not disclose how many had been laid in the strait versus destroyed in storage or on vessels.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carney Leaves Fate of 2030 Emission Reduction Target Unclear
title_cn: 卡尼表示 2030 年减排目标的命运尚不明朗
summary: Canada’s target to sharply reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 is in question after Prime Minister Mark Carney said his government will “update” its climate plan, without offering further detail.

title: Milei Approves Incentives For Lithium Mine Expansion With China Ties
title_cn: Milei 批准与中国合作的锂矿扩建激励措施
summary: Argentine President Javier Milei’s government approved a series of incentives on Thursday for the expansion of a lithium mine half-owned by a Chinese firm, a rare step for the libertarian who has prioritized ties to the Trump administration.

title: Bob Diamond Says UAE, Qatar Gained Stature on Iran War Response
title_cn: 鲍勃·戴蒙德表示，阿联酋和卡塔尔在伊朗战争应对方面获得了地位
summary: Bob Diamond praised the governments of the United Arab Emirates and Qatar for their response to the Iran war, saying they improved their standing with strong economic management during a time of regional crisis.

title: Fed’s Miran to Step Down as Governor on Warsh Swearing In
title_cn: 美联储米兰将在沃什宣誓就职后辞去理事职务
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran said he will resign from the central bank effective once incoming Chair Kevin Warsh is sworn into office, or shortly before.

title: Centrism Offers a Solution to UK’s Chaos
title_cn: 中间派为英国的混乱提供了解决方案
summary: The Labour party’s government has descended in to chaos, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Adrian Wooldridge says. Centrist leaders across the globe offer solutions. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Destroyed Most of Iran’s Sea Mines, Centcom Chief Says
title_cn: 美国中央司令部司令称，美国摧毁了伊朗大部分海雷
summary: The US has destroyed more than 90% of Iran’s inventory of around 8,000 naval mines, the commander of US forces in the Middle East told lawmakers on Thursday, in a written statement that did not address Tehran’s continued control of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Boeing Falls After Trump Unveils Smaller China Aircraft Order
title_cn: 特朗普公布较小规模的中国飞机订单后，波音股价下跌
summary: China agreed to buy 200 Boeing Co. planes, President Donald Trump said, in a multibillion-dollar deal that would mark the nation’s first purchase of US-made commercial jets in nearly a decade.

title: Bob Diamond on UK Political Turmoil, Tokenization and Crypto Bill
title_cn: Bob Diamond 谈英国政治动荡、代币化和加密货币法案
summary: Bob Diamond, founding partner and CEO of Atlas Merchant Capital, discusses the emerging trend of tokenized real-world assets. Speaking with Bloomberg's Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Markets," Diamond also comments on the recent UK political turmoil, the outlook for Middle East markets and the Senate Banking Committee advancing the so-called Clarity Act that would establish the CFTC as the primary regulator for large parts of the crypto industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Labour’s ‘King of the North’ Takes First Step to Topple Starmer
title_cn: 工党“北方之王”迈出推翻斯塔默的第一步
summary: Before he even entered the race, Andy Burnham was the favorite to unseat Keir Starmer as Britain’s prime minister.

title: Trump Says Boeing Wins 200 Jet Plane Order From China
title_cn: 特朗普称波音赢得中国200架喷气式飞机订单
summary: President Donald Trump said China agreed to buy 200 planes from Boeing Co., marking the nation’s first purchase of US-made commercial jets in nearly a decade. Trump spoke on Hannity on Fox News Thursday, where he also signaled China is willing to support negotiations with Iran, which is something China has not explicitly confirmed. Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham Path to Challenge Starmer Opens as MP Quits
title_cn: 国会议员辞职后，伯纳姆挑战斯塔默的道路开启
summary: A shakeup in United Kingdom politics. Labour Member of Parliament Josh Simons will be stepping down, clearing the way for Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham to return to Parliament and then seek the prime minister's job. This raises the stake for Prime Minister Keir Starmer who is fighting to keep his job. Bloomberg's Lizzy Burden has the latest.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Senator Pay Will Be Withheld During Shutdowns After Midterms
title_cn: 中期选举后停工期间参议员工资将被扣留
summary: Senators’ paychecks will be withheld during future government shutdowns, a move aimed at providing an additional incentive to avoid funding lapses.
